ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_Brick
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Highly durable brick, used in crafting various machines.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_ChromiumBar
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: A very powerful and strong alloy.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_ChromiumCompound
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Mixture of Iridium, Quartz and Prismatic powders, ready to be smelted.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_PulverizedCopper
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Large pile of pure copper, must be smelted in an Electric Furnace.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_PulverizedGold
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Large pile of pure gold, must be smelted in an Electric Furnace.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_PulverizedIridium
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Large pile of pure iridium, must be smelted in an Electric Furnace, can be fused with a Prismatic Shard.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_PulverizedIron
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Large pile of pure iron, must be smelted in an Electric Furnace.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_PulverizedPrismaticShard
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Large pile of pure Prismatic stone, must be combined with Pulverised Iridium & Quartz.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_PulverizedQuartz
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Large pile of pure quartz, must be smelted in an Electric Furnace.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_PulverizedRadioactiveMetal
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Large pile of pure radioactive material, must be smelted in an Electric Furnace.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_SmeltedFairyStone
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Fairy Stone that has been melted down and refined

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_Ash
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Remains of burned fuel.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_DepletedUranium
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Uranium that cannot be used for a nuclear reaction anymore.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_HeavyOil
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Oil that is high in Sulfur. Takes longer to process.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_LightOil
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Oil that is low in Sulfur. Takes less time to process.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_RefinedHeavyOil
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Heavy Oil that has been processed for use.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_RefinedLightOil
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Heavy Oil that has been processed for use.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_RefinedUranium
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Uranium that has a higher concentration of the correct isotopes for fission.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_SolidFuel
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Energy dense fuel made by compressing fossil fuels.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_PrismaticBar
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: A bar of purified prismatic metal.
